descriptionHtml:
Leopard 58 For Sale 2017 | 5 Cabins Version | Tax Not Paid

If you are searching for a spacious, well-maintained, and reliable private catamaran, this Leopard 58 For Sale 2017 presents an ideal option. Renowned for its innovative design, comfort, and performance, the Leopard 58 is highly sought after in the sailing community. This particular 2017 model has been carefully maintained by her private owner and remains in good condition. Her comprehensive inventory of equipment and modern systems sets her apart among similar yachts currently on the market.

Leopard 58 For Sale 2017 – Specifications

  • Boat Type: Catamaran (Main sail - Battened)
  • Year Built: 2017
  • Cabins / Heads: 5 / 5
  • LOA: 17.56 m
  • Beam: 8.45 m
  • Draft: 1.85 m
  • Displacement: (tn): Not specified
  • Fuel Tank: 3,000 lt
  • Water Tank: 7,500 lt
  • Engines: 2 x Yanmar 110hp (4JH110-M), 2,800 hrs
  • Generator: 20KW
  • Autopilot: Yes
  • Plotter / Radar / GPS: Yes
  • AIS / VHF: Yes
  • Bow Thruster: Yes
  • Steering Wheel(s): 1
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Solar Panels: Yes
  • Electric Winches: 3
  • Bimini: Yes
  • Deck Shower: Yes
  • Washing Machine / Dishwasher: Yes
  • Icemakers / Wine Cooler: Yes
  • Flybridge Wet Bar & Electric Grill: Yes
  • Cabin Fans: Yes
  • Electric Heads: Yes
  • Watermaker: Yes
  • Dinghy & Outboard: Included (25hp Yamaha)
  • Camera Rear-View: Yes

This Leopard 58 For Sale 2017 is a superb choice if you are looking for a comfortable, reliable, and well-equipped catamaran in good condition. She is ready for private cruising or liveaboard adventures, delivering the renowned comfort and versatility that Leopard catamarans are known for. For those seeking a high-quality yacht on the market, this 2017 Leopard 58 certainly deserves consideration.
